info.title: json2yaml
info.description: json2yaml is .NET global tool for converting json to yaml

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: json2yaml converter reads json input and produces converted yaml output

options.name: --input
options.description: Path to json input file. E.g. `-i:file.json` (or `-i="file.json"`). If empty value provided (`-i`), converter will search current directory for *.json file.

options.name: --url
options.description: HTTP endpoint to fetch json input from.

options.name: --skip-content-type-check
options.description: Flag specifies if http response Content-Type header check can be skipped. Only in effect when -u option is provided.

options.name: --console-output
options.description: Flag specifies if converted yaml should be printed directly to console. (In this case -o option is ignorred.)

options.name: --output
options.description: Path to output yaml file. E.g. `-o:file.yaml (or -o="file.yaml")`. If omitted or empty value provided ('-o') converter will output to file named like input file or the last segment of url, but with .yaml extension. Required if input is read from stdin.

options.name: --max-size
options.description: Specifies size limit for file to be converted. E.g. `-m:10`. If omitted, converter will skip file larger that 20 MB. Respected only when used together with -i option.

options.name: --format-null-as
options.description: Yaml can represent null in different ways. Supported values: null|Null|NULL|~|empty. Default is "null".

options.name: --json-framework
options.description: framework to use for json parser. Supported values: system|newtonsoft. Default is "system".

options.name: --version
options.description: Shows tool version. If more options are provided this option is ignored.

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Verbose output. Shows more details on errors.
